claimText: KFUPM's AI+X page states that KFUPM launched ChatGPT Edu in partnership with OpenAI and describes the initiative as integrating AI tools into classrooms and research environments.
normalizedValue: ChatGPT Edu launch and classroom/research-environment integration stated by KFUPM.
